title: Resources Inventory
description: The inventory of resource types that researchers and institutions may hold, independent of how they are organised or treated.

name.description: Short name of the resource type.

description.description: Concise definition of the resource type.

typicalForm.description: Common physical or digital forms this resource takes.

commonlyPresent.description: How frequently this resource type is present in typical heritage science work.

realisticCeiling.description: The highest treatment level this resource type can realistically reach, with notes on dependencies. Free text to allow nuance.

realisticCeilingLevels.description: Structured form of the realistic ceiling, listing specific levels reachable.

scopeNotes.description: How this resource type typically behaves with respect to scope (individual, institutional, etc).

accessibilityNotes.description: How this resource type typically behaves with respect to accessibility.

licensingNotes.description: How this resource type typically behaves with respect to re-use licensing.

related.description: External resources relevant to this resource type, including example datasets, related schemas, and so on.
